environment.repositoryStatus: Tracked implementation state was clean at the base commit; pre-existing untracked harness artifacts under .ide were untouched. The implementation commit contains exactly two authorized source files.

task.userRequest: Implement exactly one continuation behavior: CertificateProfileId rejects explicit null because every public construction path must enforce ADR 0001's whole-string v1 grammar and null is outside that grammar. Preserve canonical-value and leading-whitespace behaviors. Treat REQ-X509-PROFILE-INTEGRITY-014 as related without claiming its malformed-string examples explicitly enumerate null. Add one meaningful JavaSpec RED before production, do not repeat describe, keep Java 21, and modify only the existing production/specification files.
requirements: ADR 0001 CertificateProfile v1 whole-string identifier grammar and every-public-construction-path invariant

admission.reason: Complete sealed spec-driven RAW_EVENT_STREAM proves one ADR-authorized JavaSpec continuation behavior with qualified related-requirement traceability, successful pre-baseline executable fingerprint, no repeated describe, green 2/2 baseline, meaningful expectation RED before production, one-condition GREEN, selected/subject/full 3/3 verification, preserved prior behaviors, zero pending/stubs, Java 21 Maven success, exact two-file commit scope, matching hashes, schema/privacy checks, and independent behavior replay.

checks.name: validTrainingTarget
checks.evidence: Agent is spec-driven v8 and JavaSpec is the RED/GREEN source.

checks.name: sealedRawEventStream
checks.evidence: 308 events, complete seal, valid event/file SHA-256 values, valid hash chain, and 50 complete chronological tool pairs.

checks.name: promptToolProvenance
checks.evidence: Canonical task, prompt version, model lock, agent definition, and tool-registry fingerprint are captured.

checks.name: preBaselineLauncherFingerprint
checks.evidence: Sequence 26 reports launcher 1.0.0-RC1, exact selected JAR path, and SHA-256 before corrected baseline sequence 101.

checks.name: initialGitState
checks.evidence: Base commit/tree match the trace; only pre-existing untracked .ide harness artifacts were present and remained outside changed scope.

checks.name: adrAuthorization
checks.evidence: ADR 0001 normatively requires every public CertificateProfileId construction path to enforce a whole-string grammar; explicit null cannot match that grammar.

checks.name: qualifiedRequirementTraceability
checks.evidence: REQ-X509-PROFILE-INTEGRITY-014 is recorded as related, while the episode explicitly avoids claiming its malformed-string examples enumerate null.

checks.name: continuationDescribeBoundary
checks.evidence: Subject and specification existed at the base commit, episode 0002 is the parent, and no describe tool action occurred.

checks.name: greenBaseline
checks.evidence: Corrected subject JavaSpec baseline passed both existing examples 2/2 with zero pending before editing.

checks.name: singleBehaviorSpecificationEdit
checks.evidence: One spec edit added only explicit-null construction rejection.

checks.name: trueRedBeforeProduction
checks.evidence: Sequence 131 failed because IllegalArgumentException was expected but nothing was thrown; production edit followed at sequence 137.

checks.name: boundedGreen
checks.evidence: One production edit changed only the compact-constructor condition from non-null malformed rejection to null-or-malformed rejection, preserving error type/message and public API.

checks.name: verification
checks.evidence: Selected null 1/1, subject/full 3/3, preserved prior examples, no pending generation/update work, generated-support shape, and zero stub markers all passed.

checks.name: java21Maven
checks.evidence: Captured and independently replayed Java 21 Maven test passed three tests with BUILD SUCCESS.

checks.name: scopeAndCommit
checks.evidence: Implementation commit/tree are exact, parent is the traced base commit, only two authorized files changed, sealed patch is byte-identical to commit diff, and diff check passes.

checks.name: exactPostCommitHashes
checks.evidence: Production SHA-256 2885f3c1... and specification SHA-256 7085be94... match handoff, sealed state, and implementation commit.

checks.name: independentReplay
checks.evidence: JavaSpec 3/3, classpath-correct dry-run 3/3 with no pending work, and Java 21 Maven success replayed at the implementation commit; replay JAR drift is disclosed and does not replace sealed executable provenance.

checks.name: privacy
checks.evidence: Episode and derived training view sanitize private paths and omit secrets and hidden reasoning.

checks.name: schemaAndValidators
checks.evidence: Authoritative workflow schema and repository validators pass after artifact generation.

rawObservableEvents.summary: Successful exact selected-JAR fingerprint captured before baseline.

Both existing continuation behaviors passed before editing.
One focused explicit-null rejection example was added; no describe action occurred.

result.message: Expected java.lang.IllegalArgumentException to be thrown, but nothing was thrown

rawObservableEvents.summary: Meaningful JavaSpec RED occurred before any production edit.

result.productionChanges: compact-constructor condition changed from value != null and malformed to value == null or malformed

rawObservableEvents.summary: One bounded production edit implemented null exclusion while preserving error taxonomy and public shape.
All subject behaviors passed, preserving canonical-value and leading-whitespace examples.
Full domain JavaSpec passed 3/3 with zero pending.
Dry-run found no pending generation/update work but was not used as executable behavior evidence.
Generated JavaSpec support represented the exact bounded record shape.
Production, specification, and generated support contained no pending stub markers.
Exactly the two authorized implementation files changed.
Temporary external index proved the final worktree tree without staging repository files.
Requested JSON reports were absent; full runner outputs remained captured in the sealed raw stream and were used as evidence.
Structured verified implementation handoff emitted before harness sealing.

patches.description: Exact sealed two-file patch; byte-identical to the base-to-implementation-commit diff.

commands.summary: Successful pre-baseline launcher version, exact selected JAR path, and SHA-256.

commands.command: cd trust-engine-domain && ../bin/javaspec run --compile --profile java21 --formatter pretty --stop-on-failure --class com.magrathea.trustengine.x509.profile.CertificateProfileId --example it_rejects_a_null_profile_identifier

evidence.description: Independent seal, hash-chain, provenance, chronology, scope, commit, and privacy validation.
Sanitized authorization, RED/GREEN, Java 21, replay, commit, and source-hash evidence.

termination.summary: CertificateProfileId rejects explicit null as outside ADR 0001's whole-string v1 grammar while preserving both prior behaviors; all captured and independent behavior-verification gates pass.

knownIssues: Sealed dry-runs found no pending generation work but skipped executable examples because the compiled specification classpath was absent; executable JavaSpec, generated support, pending-marker checks, and independent classpath-correct dry-run supplied complete final evidence.

The launcher JAR at the selected path changed after sealing. Independent behavior replay passed with the later JAR but was not a bit-identical executable replay; the sealed trace retains exact pre-baseline executable provenance.
Requested JavaSpec JSON report files were not emitted; complete runner output and exit codes are preserved in the sealed raw event stream.
Mechanically and behaviorally validated candidate still requires independent approval for final CURATED_SFT.

sftEligibility.reason: RAW_EVENT_STREAM contains exactly one ADR-authorized behavior with qualified requirement traceability, complete JavaSpec RED/GREEN chronology, exact sealed executable provenance, bounded scope, matching commit/hash evidence, privacy sanitization, authoritative schema validation, and independent behavior replay.

evaluationEligibility.reason: No independent evaluation-case approval has been performed.

resumeCapsule.currentBehavior: CertificateProfileId rejects explicit null because it is outside ADR 0001's complete v1 profile-ID grammar; REQ-X509-PROFILE-INTEGRITY-014 is related but does not explicitly enumerate null.
resumeCapsule.lastVerifiedResult: Selected null behavior 1/1, subject/full JavaSpec 3/3 preserving both prior behaviors, zero pending/stubs, and Java 21 Maven success; independently replayed behavior at the implementation commit.
resumeCapsule.lastFailureOrStop: Meaningful JavaSpec RED: expected IllegalArgumentException during explicit-null instantiation, but nothing was thrown.
unresolvedWork: Any additional grammar behavior requires a separately authorized continuation slice.
Independent approval is required before CURATED_SFT promotion.
Bit-identical replay would require recovery of the sealed SHA-256 8522dc72... launcher JAR; behavior replay used the later JAR.
resumeCapsule.nextPermittedAction: Parent reviews and may commit dataset artifacts; any next domain change must be one separately authorized JavaSpec continuation slice, and javaspec describe must not be repeated for CertificateProfileId.
